message:
feat(dashboard): add network traffic treemap and disk keyboard navigation

Network view:
- Use nettop for actual per-process bytes
- Reverse DNS lookup with caching (5min TTL)
- Distribute bytes proportionally among remote hosts
- Show traffic in bytes (MB/GB) instead of connection count

Disk view:
- Progressive scanning with estimates shown immediately
- Keyboard navigation: arrows to select, Enter to drill in
- Backspace to navigate up, cleaner breadcrumb format
- Selected folder highlighted with white outline

Tooltips:
- CPU/Memory treemap: show PID, CPU%, MEM%
- Disk: show full path and size
- Network: show hostname, IP, bytes, connections, ports
